device_name: Critical Care Suite with Pneumothorax Detection AI Algorithm, Critical Care Suite 2.1, Critical Care Suite
intended_use: Critical Care Suite with Pneumotharax Detection AI Algorithm is intended to aide a clinician in the detection and localization of a pneumothorax on frontal chest radiographic images.
intended_use_full: Critical Care Suite with Pneumotharax Detection AI Algorithm is intended to aide a clinician in the detection and localization of a pneumothorax on frontal chest radiographic images.
ground_truth: Reference standard established by three blinded radiologists
other_metrics: For large pneumothoraxes: sensitivity 96.3% (93.1%, 99.2%); for small pneumothoraxes: sensitivity 75.0% (69.2%, 80.8%); Pneumothorax Overlay partial localization 98.1% (96.6%, 99.6%); full regional agreement 67.8% (62.7%, 73.0%); DICE Similarity Coefficient 0.705 (0.683, 0.724). Multi-reader study: improved reader mean AUC by 14.5% (7.0%, 22.0%; p=0.002) from 76.8% non-aided to 91.3% aided; reader sensitivity increased 16.3% (13.1%, 19.5%; p<0.001) from 67.4% to 83.7%; reader specificity increased 12.4% (9.6%, 15.1%; p<0.001) from 76.6% to 89.0%.
